hero.title: Austria-specific features for your Parqet account
hero.subtitle: With Alpvara, you can spot potential tax risks and import company pension data with minimal effort.
hero.disclaimer: Alpvara does not store any data. All data is kept only in your Parqet account. No investment advice.

watchtower.description: Find holdings that may require additional tax review in Austria.

bav.description: Import company pension data as a custom insurance in Parqet.

features.import: Guides you through portfolio, account, and data entry.
features.approximation: Approximates monthly values from yearly contributions and final balance.

help.text: The BaV function allows you to store the data of your company pension in Parqet.

steps.portfolio: Select the portfolio in which you want to store the BaV data.
steps.account: Select the account on which the BaV data should be stored.
steps.history: Enter the data of your first insurance year.

history.title: History
history.help: This history is an approximation and may differ from the actual quarterly data.

empty.title: No data available
empty.description: Store the data of your first insurance year.

saved.title: Data saved
saved.description: The data has been saved successfully.

watchtower.help: The watchtower shows possible risks in your portfolio. The watchtower is not financial advice, but rather a tool to indicate possible risks. Please carefully review all warnings, for example through OeKB. Incorrect information is not ruled out.

warning.reit-bdc: If this is a REIT or BDC, tax disadvantages may arise.
warning.fund: If this is a non-reporting fund, tax disadvantages may arise. Check OeKB for further details.
warning.swap: This may be a swap-based product, which could result in tax disadvantages. Check OeKB for further details.
